ddls:
CREATE TABLE "traffic_fatalities" (
  "fatality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fatality record */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year the data pertains to */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of fatality */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location of the fatality */,
  "cause_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cause of the fatality */,
  "vehicle_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of vehicle involved */,
  "population_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the population data for the area */,
  "january" INTEGER /* Number of fatalities in January */,
  "february" INTEGER /* Number of fatalities in February */,
  "march" INTEGER /* Number of fatalities in March */,
  "april" INTEGER /* Number of fatalities in April */,
  "may" INTEGER /* Number of fatalities in May */,
  "june" INTEGER /* Number of fatalities in June */,
  "july" INTEGER /* Number of fatalities in July */,
  "august" INTEGER /* Number of fatalities in August */,
  "september" INTEGER /* Number of fatalities in September */,
  "october" INTEGER /* Number of fatalities in October */,
  "november" INTEGER /* Number of fatalities in November */,
  "december" INTEGER /* Number of fatalities in December */,
  "total" INTEGER /* Total number of fatalities for the year */,
  "data_version" TEXT /* Version of the data record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fatality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_traffic_fatalities_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES fatality_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_traffic_fatalities_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Year for which the data is collected */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population for the year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fatality_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fatality type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the fatality type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the fatality type */,
  "severity_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the fatality type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "monthly_fatalities" (
  "monthly_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each monthly fatality record */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year the data pertains to */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of fatality */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location of the fatality */,
  "cause_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cause of the fatality */,
  "vehicle_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of vehicle involved */,
  "population_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the population data for the area */,
  "month_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the month of the year */,
  "fatality_count" INTEGER /* Number of fatalities in the month */,
  "data_version" TEXT /* Version of the data record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("monthly_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_monthly_fatalities_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES fatality_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_monthly_fatalities_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_monthly_fatalities_month_id FOREIGN KEY ("month_id") REFERENCES months ("month_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "months" (
  "month_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each month */,
  "month_name" TEXT /* Name of the month */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("month_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, researcher, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "active_status" INTEGER /* Active status of the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "fatality_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fatality record being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_fatality_id FOREIGN KEY ("fatality_id") REFERENCES traffic_fatalities ("fatality_id")
)
